languages.text: "Да простит меня Император... Но я лучше сгину, сражаясь за веру в Него, чем замерзну насмерть во грехе из-за вашей алчности!"

traits.locale_text: "Да простит меня Император... Но я лучше сгину, сражаясь за веру в Него, чем замерзну насмерть во грехе из-за вашей алчности!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"
languages.original_text: "Да простит меня Император... Но я лучше сгину, сражаясь за веру в Него, чем замерзну насмерть во грехе из-за вашей алчности!"

traits.locale_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Möge der Kaiser mir verzeihen... Aber lieber sterbe ich im Kampf für seinen Glauben, als dass ich für Eure Habgier erfriere!"
languages.original_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"

languages.text: "Que l'Empereur me pardonne... Mais je préfère périr en combattant pour sa foi que de mourir de froid en travaillant pour votre avarice !"
languages.original_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"

languages.text: "愿皇帝宽恕我...但我宁愿为他的信仰而战而死 也不愿为你的贪婪而冻死！"
languages.original_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"

languages.text: "Que el Emperador me perdone... ¡Pero prefiero perecer luchando por Su fe que morir congelado trabajando para tu avaricia!"
languages.original_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"

languages.text: 「皇帝よ、お許しください。しかし、あなたの欲のために働いて凍え死ぬくらいなら、主の信仰のために戦って死ぬほうがましです！"
languages.original_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"

languages.text: "İmparator beni affetsin... Ama senin açgözlülüğün uğruna donarak ölmektense, O'nun inancı uğruna savaşarak ölmeyi tercih ederim!"
languages.original_text: "May the Emperor forgive me... But I would rather perish fighting for His faith than freeze to death toiling for your avarice!"
